response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 20 years of broad, hands-on engineering experience and recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq), but the resume falls well short of what a Director-level AI strategy role demands. There is no advanced degree in AI, no demonstrated track record of advising enterprise customers on cloud or AI adoption, and the AI engagement is both recent and limited in scale. The role calls for recognized AI thought leadership and large-platform impact that this resume does not substantiate; the candidate reads as a strong senior/staff engineer, not a principal-level AI strategist.
strengths: 20 years of polyglot engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and high-throughput microservice infrastructure
Current hands-on engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, reflecting genuine first-mover interest in agentic tooling
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, demonstrating ability to conceive, build, and sustain an open-source platform independently
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI or a related field, a strongly preferred qualification for this Director-level IC role
AI experience is shallow and recent (beginning April 2025 by resume dates) with no demonstrated history of shipping recognized AI products or platforms at scale
No evidence of strategic advisory or thought-leadership activity with enterprise customers or partners, which is a core and explicit responsibility of this position
